LanguageData.VFET_FormCity.description: You have successfully completed all medieval research projects and have advanced to industrial tech level. This will allow you to pick a Cornerstone - a powerful bonus that applies only to your civilization.
LanguageData.VFET_FormCity.label: Industrial tech level
LanguageData.VFET_FormCollective.description: You have successfully completed all industrial research projects and have advanced to spacer tech level. This will allow you to pick a Cornerstone - a powerful bonus that applies only to your civilization.
LanguageData.VFET_FormCollective.label: Spacer tech level
LanguageData.VFET_FormNexus.description: You have successfully completed all spacer research projects and have advanced to ultratech tech level. This will allow you to pick a Cornerstone - a powerful bonus that applies only to your civilization.
LanguageData.VFET_FormNexus.label: Ultratech tech level
LanguageData.VFET_FormTown.description: You have successfully completed all neolithic research projects and have advanced to medieval tech level. This will allow you to pick a Cornerstone - a powerful bonus that applies only to your civilization.
LanguageData.VFET_FormTown.label: Medieval tech level
LanguageData.VFET_FormTribe.description: You have successfully completed all pre-neolithic research projects and have advanced to neolithic tech level. This will allow you to pick a Cornerstone - a powerful bonus that applies only to your civilization.
LanguageData.VFET_FormTribe.label: Neolithic tech level
